title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by going to Settings > Security > Reset Password. A password reset link will be sent to the registered email address. The link is valid for 24 hours.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase. To request a refund, go to Orders > Select Order > Request Refund. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days.

title: Account Deletion
content: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Once deleted, all your data will be permanently removed within 30 days. This action is irreversible.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer three plans: Free (basic features), Pro ($9.99/month with advanced analytics and priority support), and Enterprise (custom pricing with dedicated account manager and SLA).

title: Contact Support
content: You can reach our support team via email at support@company.com, through the in-app live chat (available 9 AM - 6 PM EST), or by calling 1-800-123-4567.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable 2FA from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. We support authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy) and SMS verification. 2FA is recommended for all accounts.

title: Data Export
content: Users can export their data by going to Settings > Privacy > Export Data. The export includes all personal information, activity logs, and content. The export file is available for download within 24 hours.

title: Billing & Invoices
content: Invoices are generated monthly and can be viewed under Settings > Billing > Invoices. Payment methods accepted include credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex) and PayPal.

title: API Access
content: API access is available for Pro and Enterprise users. API keys can be generated from Settings > Developer > API Keys. Rate limits are 100 requests/minute for Pro and 1000 requests/minute for Enterprise.

title: Browser Support
content: Our application supports the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. For the best experience, we recommend using Chrome.

title: Mobile App
content: Our mobile app is available on iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). The app supports all features available on the web version including push notifications.

title: File Upload Limits
content: Free users can upload files up to 10MB. Pro users have a 100MB limit. Enterprise users have a 1GB limit. Supported formats include PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG, and CSV.
